name: Quentin Tarantino

acts.description: Admitted to knowing about Harvey Weinstein's behavior for decades and did nothing; defended Roman Polanski publicly
2003 Howard Stern interview defending Roman Polanski's rape of a 13-year-old as not 'rape rape'

behavior_summary: Admitted to knowing about Weinstein's predatory behavior and staying silent for decades. Publicly defended Polanski on Howard Stern. Apologized for the Polanski comments years later.

art.summary: Possibly the most influential American filmmaker of the past 30 years. Every crime film, every pop-culture-saturated script owes him a debt.

verdict.blurb: Knew Weinstein was a predator for 25 years and made movies with him anyway. Also went on Howard Stern to explain why raping a 13-year-old isn't 'rape rape.' Pulp Fiction remains a masterpiece. The moral ledger is messier.
